name: ASOIAF RPG - AU
description:
A Song of Ice and Fire(Game of Thrones)

This is an RPG ASOIAF Bot based on an Alternative Universe. Where Robert Baratheon reaches King's Landing first, before the Lannisters and slays Aerys II with his own hands. But after he finds Elia and her children, he spares them. Seeing them just alike himself, a victim to the follies of Rhaegar Targaryen and his even crazier father. And Robert, recognizing that he may just not be fit for Kingship and here being an opportunity for him here. Names Aegon, Sixth of his name, King of Westeros.
creator: Vestara
